home.title: Enzo Balderrama
home.description: I build web and desktop applications specialized in React, Spring Boot and SQL.

projectWoWelbe.title: WoWelbe
projectWoWelbe.description: Web portal developed for a custom World of Warcraft Wrath of the Lich King server. It integrates server-compatible authentication, an online store, character management and payment processing using React and Spring Boot.
features: SRP6 authentication compatible with World of Warcraft.
Character management connected directly to the game server.
Purchase of items, mounts, pets and services.
Special Points (PE) and Donation Points (PD) system.
REST backend built with Spring Boot.

projectTechBeStore.title: TechBeStore
projectTechBeStore.description:
TechBeStore is a desktop application built with ElectronJS, React and Vite to provide a modern business management solution for small and medium-sized companies.

Unlike a traditional application, it was designed as a reusable and fully customizable platform. Each deployment can be adapted to the client's branding by changing the name, logo, colors and business-specific settings without modifying the core architecture.

Powered by SQLite, all information is stored locally, providing a fast, secure and fully offline experience.
projectTechBeStore.adaptableDescription: TechBeStore was designed as a reusable software product. Each customer can receive a personalized version with its own branding and business-specific features while preserving the same core architecture.
projectTechBeStore.note: The evaluation version requires a temporary license. To try the application, request a trial license by emailing
features: Custom branding, logo and visual identity.
Complete sales workflow with customer management.
